work_items.title: Build Hub queue lifecycle API foundation
work_items.description: Expose the M17 local queue lifecycle through safe Hub API endpoints for add, inspect readiness, start, generate Codex prompt, and complete with evidence. The endpoints must remain local-only, gated, and must not execute agents, Codex, LLMs, GitHub API, gh, PRs, issues, workflow activity, or network calls.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Hub API exposes local-only endpoints for add queue item, inspect readiness, start item, generate Codex prompt, and complete item with evidence; endpoints return stable JSON; endpoints reuse existing M17 operators; tests cover success and gated failure paths; no Hub mutation UI is added in this task.
work_items.validation_summary: M18 Hub queue lifecycle API foundation was implemented by Codex and validated locally. Route-level tests passed with 7 passed. Core targeted validation passed with 232 passed. Hub UI/API targeted validation passed with 80 passed. Local dashboard/report targeted validation passed with 13 passed.
work_items.evidence_note: Added local-only Hub API endpoints for add queue item, inspect readiness, start item, generate Codex prompt, and complete item with evidence. No Hub mutation UI, agent execution, LLM routing, GitHub API, gh, PR, issue, workflow, or network execution was added.
tests_run: git diff --check; python -m pytest tests/test_hub_local_queue_lifecycle_api.py; python -m pytest tests/test_roadmap_db_control.py tests/test_config_and_migrations.py tests/test_cli.py; python -m pytest tests/test_hub_project_factory_api.py tests/test_hub_active_project_api.py tests/test_hub_ui_foundation.py; python -m pytest tests/test_local_queue_agent_summary.py tests/test_local_project_dashboard.py tests/test_local_project_report.py

work_items.title: M77 Codex CLI Dispatch Contract
work_items.description: Define the operator-gated Codex CLI dispatch contract, run-state model, evidence fields, dry-run/no-execute behavior, and safety boundaries before any process invocation exists.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Contract is documented and testable.
- Dry-run/no-execute behavior is explicit.
- No Codex process invocation is added.
- No automatic queue execution is added.
- No GitHub API, gh, issue, PR, workflow, or external mutation behavior is added.

M76 safety notes:
- Seeded for review only.
- Not started automatically.
- No prompt, agent, Codex, local LLM, GitHub, gh, issue, PR, workflow, commit, or push action was invoked.

Codex CLI was not invoked. No Codex dispatch, GitHub API, gh, issue, PR, workflow, local LLM execution expansion, or automatic next-item execution was added.

work_items.title: M78 Operator-Gated Codex CLI Dispatch Prototype
work_items.description: Prototype one explicitly operator-approved Codex CLI dispatch for one local queue item after M77 contract is complete.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Requires explicit operator approval.
- Allows only one queue item at a time.
- Does not auto-run the next item.
- Captures run state and available stdout/stderr/artifacts.
- Records error and completion states.
- Requires review evidence before completion.

M76 safety notes:
- Seeded for review only.
- Not started automatically.
- No prompt, agent, Codex, local LLM, GitHub, gh, issue, PR, workflow, commit, or push action was invoked.

No automatic next-item execution, GitHub API, gh, issue, PR, workflow, local LLM expansion, or API/UI surface was added.

work_items.title: M79 Queue Blocking and Sequencing Enforcement
work_items.description: Enforce queue/dependency blocking so downstream items cannot move forward until upstream LLM/Codex work is completed, reviewed, validated, and evidenced.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Dependent items remain blocked while upstream run state is active or incomplete.
- Completion requires review evidence.
- No unattended multi-item execution is introduced.
- No automatic next-item execution is introduced.

M76 safety notes:
- Seeded for review only.
- Not started automatically.
- No prompt, agent, Codex, local LLM, GitHub, gh, issue, PR, workflow, commit, or push action was invoked.
work_items.validation_summary: Codex implemented M79 queue blocking and sequencing enforcement. Required targeted validation passed: 468 passed, 1 warning. git diff --check returned only line-ending warnings and no whitespace errors.
work_items.evidence_note: Operator reviewed Codex output, implementation diff, validation results, commit, and push result. Codex could not commit due to sandbox .git permission restrictions, so operator committed and pushed validated implementation manually.

work_items.title: M79.1 Codex CLI Windows Runner Hardening
work_items.description: Harden the Windows Codex CLI workflow after M79 by documenting and/or fixing sandbox Git permission limits, stdin prompt handoff reliability, and Windows output decoding behavior.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Document or implement a reliable prompt handoff pattern so Codex receives the full prompt body, not only the first line.
- Document or implement Windows output decoding hardening for Codex dispatch/stdout/stderr capture.
- Document current Codex sandbox Git permission behavior where implementation can be authored by Codex but commit/push may remain operator-owned.
- Preserve local-only, operator-gated workflow boundaries.
- No automatic queue completion.
- No automatic next-item execution.

routing_metadata.routing_reason: This hardening item should be implemented with Codex CLI because it directly targets Codex CLI dispatch and Windows runner behavior.

work_items.title: M78.5 Operator Workflow Compression and Prompt Builder Agent Contract
work_items.description: Compress the current manual queue-to-prompt-to-Codex workflow by adding an operator workflow preparation layer and a Prompt Builder Agent contract that generates high-quality reviewed prompt artifacts before dispatch.
work_items.notes:
Acceptance criteria:
- Add a workflow preparation command that reduces manual inspection/start/prompt-generation steps.
- Add a Prompt Builder Agent / Prompt Architect Agent contract.
- Generated prompts must use queue item context, docs, routing metadata, model/engine target, safety gates, and validation requirements.
- Prompt Builder creates prompt artifacts only.
- Prompt Builder does not execute prompts, call Codex, invoke local LLMs, mutate source files, or advance queue items automatically.
- Workflow preparation must remain local-only and operator-gated.
- No automatic next-item execution.
- No unattended multi-item execution.
- No GitHub API, gh, issue, PR, workflow, or GitHub mutation.
work_items.validation_summary: M78.5 implemented and validated. Added local-only, artifact-only Prompt Builder Agent contract and prepare-queue-item-dispatch workflow preparation command. Generated prompts now include task context, queue status, project/repo binding, source reading, boundaries, validation, smoke checks, diff check, commit/push expectations, final response requirements, and completion evidence template. No automatic dispatch, automatic queue completion, automatic next-item execution, GitHub API, gh, issue, PR, workflow mutation, or local LLM expansion was added.
work_items.evidence_note: Codex result reported 462 targeted tests passed. git diff --check passed with existing CRLF warnings only.
